2603.11266.title: The Unlearning Mirage: A Dynamic Framework for Evaluating LLM Unlearning
2603.11266.paper_summary: Unlearning in Large Language Models (LLMs) aims to enhance safety, mitigate biases, and comply with legal mandates, such as the right to be forgotten. However, existing unlearning methods are brittle: minor query modifications, such as multi-hop reasoning and entity aliasing, can recover supposedly forgotten information. As a result, current evaluation metrics often create an illusion of effectiveness, failing to detect these vulnerabilities due to reliance on static, unstructured benchmarks. We propose a dynamic framework that stress tests unlearning robustness using complex structured queries. Our approach first elicits knowledge from the target model (pre-unlearning) and constructs targeted probes, ranging from simple queries to multi-hop chains, allowing precise control over query difficulty. Our experiments show that the framework (1) shows comparable coverage to existing benchmarks by automatically generating semantically equivalent Q&A probes, (2) aligns with prior evaluations, and (3) uncovers new unlearning failures missed by other benchmarks, particularly in multi-hop settings. Furthermore, activation analyses show that single-hop queries typically follow dominant computation pathways, which are more likely to be disrupted by unlearning methods. In contrast, multi-hop queries tend to use alternative pathways that often remain intact, explaining the brittleness of unlearning techniques in multi-hop settings. Our framework enables practical and scalable evaluation of unlearning methods without the need for manual construction of forget test sets, enabling easier adoption for real-world applications. We release the pip package and the code at https://sites.google.com/view/unlearningmirage/home.
2603.11266.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）中的「遺忘」旨在增強安全性、減少偏見，並遵守法律要求，例如被遺忘的權利。然而，現有的遺忘方法脆弱：輕微的查詢修改，如多跳推理和實體別名，可能會恢復所謂的遺忘信息。因此，目前的評估指標經常產生有效性的錯覺，因為依賴靜態的、非結構化的基準，未能檢測到這些脆弱性。我們提出了一個動態框架，通過使用複雜的結構化查詢來壓力測試遺忘的穩健性。我們的方法首先從目標模型中引出知識（遺忘前）並構建針對性的探針，範圍從簡單查詢到多跳鏈，允許對查詢難度進行精確控制。我們的實驗顯示，該框架（1）通過自動生成語義等價的問答探針，顯示出與現有基準相當的覆蓋率，（2）與先前的評估一致，並且（3）揭示了其他基準未能發現的新遺忘失敗，特別是在多跳設置中。此外，激活分析顯示，單跳查詢通常遵循主導計算路徑，這些路徑更可能受到遺忘方法的干擾。相比之下，多跳查詢往往使用替代路徑，這些路徑通常保持完整，解釋了在多跳設置中遺忘技術的脆弱性。我們的框架使得對遺忘方法的實用和可擴展評估成為可能，而無需手動構建遺忘測試集，從而促進了在現實世界應用中的更容易採用。我們在 https://sites.google.com/view/unlearningmirage/home 釋出了 pip 套件和代碼。
2603.11266.author: Raj Sanjay Shah et.al.
2603.11266.authors: Raj Sanjay Shah, Jing Huang, Keerthiram Murugesan, Nathalie Baracaldo, Diyi Yang
